flashcards.definition: Heart-shaped curve; r = a(1 ± cosθ) or r = a(1 ± sinθ).
r = a cos(nθ); has n petals (n odd) or 2n petals (n even).
r = a + b cos θ; shape depends on ratio a/b (with/without inner loop).
r = aθ; distance from origin increases linearly with angle.
Replace θ → −θ (x-axis sym), θ → π−θ (y-axis sym), r → −r (origin sym).
